rule_metadata.name: ad_ldap_enum
rule_metadata.description: Detection patterns for the tool 'ad-ldap-enum' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project
rule_metadata.author: @mthcht

rules.rule_text:
rule ad_ldap_enum
{
	meta:
		description = "Detection patterns for the tool 'ad-ldap-enum' taken from the ThreatHunting-Keywords github project"
		author = "@mthcht"
		reference = "https://github.com/mthcht/ThreatHunting-Keywords"
		tool = "ad-ldap-enum"
		rule_category = "offensive_tool_keyword"

	strings:
		$string1 = " -p 'aad3b435b51404eeaad3b435b51404ee:31d6cfe0d16ae931b73c59d7e0c089c0'" nocase ascii wide
		$string2 = /\/ad\-ldap\-enum\.git/ nocase ascii wide
		$string3 = /ad\-ldap\-enum\.py/ nocase ascii wide
		$string4 = "ad-ldap-enum-main" nocase ascii wide
		$string5 = "CroweCybersecurity/ad-ldap-enum" nocase ascii wide

	condition:
		any of them
}
